response.overview: The Feminine Urge explores female rage and the monstrous feminine as a physical, aesthetic, and mythological experience. This experimental short film unfolds as an anthology, presenting a visual narrative about transformation, desire, and resistance.  Beginning with an artificial birth and ending in the dissolution of a primordial female body, the film leads viewers on an associative journey through symbolically charged spaces. Fabrics and gestures become the language of a feminist horror sensibility that resists any clear interpretation. The Feminine Urge counters linear storytelling with a poetic montage of body politics and rebellion.
response.tagline: A Short Film About The Feminine Experience
response.title: The Feminine Urge
